role: AST analysis layer for the ArchSpine mirror system that provides language-specific parsing, symbol extraction, and language discovery capabilities.
responsibility: Provides the core static analysis infrastructure by combining an AST extraction engine (extractor.ts) with a language registry (lang-registry.ts) and language discovery (lang-discovery.ts), supported by per-language rule configurations (rules/). Together, these components enable parsing of source files, extraction of exported symbols and imports, detection of programming languages, and dynamic registration of language support, forming the foundation for building a semantic index of codebases.

children.role: AST extraction engine that parses source files using `@ast-grep/napi` and language-specific YAML rules to extract exported symbols and import declarations. It is consumed by the analysis and view derivation pipeline to build the semantic index of a codebase.
AST-level language discovery utility that identifies, tracks, and resolves programming languages within the codebase. Provides snapshot and delta computation for language landscape tracking.

Central language registry mapping project source languages (e.g., TypeScript, Python) to @ast-grep/napi Lang objects. Supports both static built-in languages and dynamically loaded plugin languages via registerDynamicLanguage.
Configuration directory containing per-language AST extraction rule definitions for the ArchSpine mirror system.
